subtitle.ja: 輪を2重にして両手の小指にかけます。右親指を小指の輪に上から入れ、親指の背で小指手前の糸を取ります
subtitle.en: Double the loop and place it on both little fingers. Insert the right thumb from above into the little-finger loop and, with the back of the thumb, move over and pick down the near little-finger string.

subtitle.ja: 右親指の輪に左親指を下から入れ、輪を広げます
subtitle.en: Insert the left thumb from below into the right-thumb loop and open the loop.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指を1回転させて糸をねじります
subtitle.en: Twist both thumbs once to give the strings a single turn.

subtitle.ja: 左右の小指を1回転させて糸をねじります
subtitle.en: Twist both little fingers once to give the strings a single turn.

subtitle.ja: 同様に、親指と小指を2~3回転させて糸をねじって完成です
subtitle.en: In the same way, twist the thumbs and little fingers two or three more times to show the finished figure.

subtitle.ja: 手を開閉することで糸を紡ぎます
subtitle.en: Open and close the hands to spin the string.
